overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a player character exploring a 'Kore Kinetics' industrial facility. The character enters through an automatic door, walks through a reception lobby with NPCs and equipment displays, and approaches a doorway leading to a hangar area.

events.description: character enters through automatic sliding door into the facility lobby

agents.ego_description: walking through the automatic sliding door into the Kore Kinetics facility reception area

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench near the entrance wall

entered.detail: metal automatic door frame with glass panels and control panel
large curved reception counter with computer terminals
rectangular fluorescent ceiling lights illuminating the space

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Kore Kinetics facility through an automatic sliding door. The view shows a narrow entry corridor opening into a larger lobby area with a reception desk visible in the distance and ceiling lights providing artificial illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lobby with company signage and seating area

agents.ego_description: walking along the right wall past the illuminated Kore Kinetics sign and seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in red top sitting on bench looking at a tablet device
man in vest sitting on bench beside the woman

entered.detail: large illuminated wall sign with orange and white company logo
gray industrial metal bench with two seated individuals

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right side of the lobby past a large illuminated 'Kore Kinetics' sign. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the right, and the reception desk becomes more prominent in the center of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment display area with glass cases and technical posters

events.description: character turns left to approach and examine the display cases on the left wall

agents.ego_description: turning to examine the equipment display cases along the left wall of the facility

entered.detail: glass display cases containing mechanical parts and yellow cylindrical equipment
technical diagrams and product posters mounted on the left wall
gray sofa with a person sitting near the back wall
large leafy green plant in a cylindrical pot

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to explore the display wall featuring glass cases with mechanical equipment and technical posters. The Kore Kinetics sign and entrance bench move out of view as the character focuses on the left side of the lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear area approaching hangar access doorway with caution markings

events.description: character approaches the doorway revealing the hangar bay with yellow-black caution stripes

agents.ego_description: turning toward the center and approaching the rear doorway leading to the hangar area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on sofa near the back wall

entered.detail: large industrial doorway with glass window showing the hangar bay beyond
retro-style CRT computer monitor on a desk near the doorway
yellow and black diagonal warning stripes on the floor near the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the back of the facility and approaches a doorway leading to a hangar. A computer terminal sits on a desk to the right, and yellow-black caution stripes mark the floor near the exit. The hangar bay is visible through the doorway window.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow industrial entrance into the expansive, high-tech interior of a corporate lobby and toward a distant hangar. It begins as the character passes through automatic sliding doors, moving from a confined entry corridor into a brightly lit reception area. As the camera advances along the right side of the room, it glides past an illuminated Kore Kinetics sign and seated NPCs before the view shifts left to explore a display wall of glass cases and technical posters. The scene then turns toward the rear of the facility, passing a computer terminal and yellow-black caution stripes on the floor. Finally, the movement culminates as the camera approaches a doorway, revealing the open expanse of a hangar bay through the window.
